full_text:
Sima Jun (Shuping) 司馬鈞 (叔平)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sima Jun (司馬鈞), styledShuping (叔平). Han dynasty official. Sima Fang’s Father. Sima Yi’s great-great-grandfather. Sima Jun was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
